name: Spaghetti and Crabmeat#9
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add onions, celery, garlic, and parsley. Cook until golden brown.
2. Add tomatoes, tomato sauce, water, salt, pepper, and paprika to the pan. Stir to combine.
3. Bring mixture to a simmer over low heat. Simmer for at least 1 hour. For longer cooking time (up to 2-3 hours), add more water as needed to maintain desired consistency.
4. Add crabmeat and Spanish Sherry, stirring occasionally. Cook for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Drain angel hair pasta in the pan, reserving some of the cooking liquid. Add pasta to the sauce, mixing well.
6. Serve hot on a serving platter. Top with a generous amount of freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
